statements.sql: MERGE INTO [silver].[DimCustomer] AS tgt USING [bronze].[CustomerRaw] AS src ON tgt.CustomerID = src.CustomerID WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET FirstName = src.FirstName, LastName = src.LastName WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CustomerID, FirstName, LastName) VALUES (src.CustomerID, src.FirstName, src.LastName);
